name: tavily-search
description: Search the web for current information. Use for any question that needs up-to-date facts, finding businesses or services, looking up people or companies, research, troubleshooting, how-to questions, or anything that would benefit from web results. Examples: 'find a plumber in Montgomery TX', 'what time does Home Depot close', 'how to reset a Netgear router', 'latest news about AI agents', 'best pizza in Portland'.

input.description: JSON with search query and optional parameters.

output.description: JSON with results array (title, url, content, score), optional answer string, and response_time.
